Document: ## Core Game Rules These are the general rules of RMC14. Click them for more information. - [textlink="1. This is an English server, please only use English in all channels." link="RMCLanguage"] - [textlink="2. Follow the rules of escalation against non-hostiles." link="RMCRulesEscalation"] - [textlink="3. Don't antagonize or harass players." link="RMCKindness"] - [textlink="4. Mutinies, riots and similar activity require admin permission." link="RMCMutinies"] - 5. Don't quit if you do not get the role/kit/squad you want, be considerate. By selecting certain roles, you are opting into the possibility of supporting any given squad, regardless of personal preference.\nPlease do not opt into roles you do not feel comfortable playing, so they remain open and obtainable by all players at the start of the round. - [textlink="6. Follow the roleplay rules and standards of the server." link="RMCMutinies"]
